Thursday 6 November 2025 - Transport and Infrastructure Committee

Ministry of Transport Te Manatū Waka, Long-term Insights Briefing 2025, Moving people in 2055

Hearing of Evidence:
Ministry of Transport

Ruth Fairhall, Chief Executive
Paul O’Connell, DCE Sector Strategy
Dan Jenkins, Director – Data Improvement
Jade Mackay, Chief Transport Modeller
Mac Townsend, Senior Data Analyst – National Transport Modelling
Chris Nees, Chief of Staff
Katie Collier, Principal Adviser – Strategic Priorities
